name: ui-tanks-board
description: TanksBoard — sci-fi tank combat with TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK/FIRE input wiring, END_TURN HUD control, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

schema.name: ui-tanks-board
schema.description: TanksBoard — sci-fi tank combat with TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK/FIRE input wiring, END_TURN HUD control, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

emits.description: Fired when a tank shoots at a target.
Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click.
Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click.
Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn.
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset.

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click.

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click.

events.name: Fire
events.description: Fired when a tank shoots at a target.

events.name: End Turn
events.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn.

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset.

features.label: Features
features.description: Obstacles and structures on the board

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
